hooks.prompt: Write a session handoff note for the tab project (bill splitter with Claude Vision OCR). Run: (1) git log --oneline --since='8 hours ago', (2) git status, (3) cat HANDOFF.md 2>/dev/null, (4) cat .claude/memory/*.md 2>/dev/null. Then write HANDOFF.md with: today's date and time, what was worked on this session, current project state, and the exact next step to resume. Under 300 words, plain English.

hooks.command: git add HANDOFF.md .claude/memory/ CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'handoff: session notes'; git push 2>/dev/null || true
